title: New York Fed Releases Special Report on the Future of New York City

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: The Federal Reserve Bank of New York released a special issue of the Economic Policy Review featuring three research papers on New York City's post-pandemic recovery, covering remote work trends, office-to-housing conversions, and racial equity planning. This source concerns urban economics and housing policy rather than financial market structure or macro catalysts.
key_points: The New York Fed released a special issue of the Economic Policy Review on October 11, 2023
Papers cover post-pandemic urban change, housing flexibility, and racial equity planning in NYC
Content addresses remote work's impact on cities and office space demand
Source discusses converting commercial spaces to housing as a policy response
Historical record: published October 11, 2023, approximately 2.5 years prior to today
Source topic (urban economics/housing policy) does not align with archive focus on market structure or macro catalysts
